mp133.name: MP-133 12-Gauge Pump-Action Shotgun [MP-133]
mp133.desc:
The MP-133 is a tubular magazine pump-action shotgun produced by IzhMekh (Izhevsk Mechanical Plant). Its design evolved from the earlier IZh-81 pump-action shotgun, primarily intended for civilian markets and security personnel.

<color=#4fc3f7>Pellet damage (×8): Creature 40 / Block 30</color>
sks.name: Simonov SKS 7.62x39 Carbine [SKS]
sks.desc:
A semi-automatic carbine designed by legendary firearms designer Sergei Simonov, specifically for 7.62x39mm ammunition. It was the first intermediate-power cartridge weapon officially adopted by the Soviet Union, commonly known abroad as the SKS-45. The SKS not only has massive circulation in CIS countries but also became a popular civilian weapon in Western countries, with various copies and improved versions still in service with military and police forces in multiple countries. This rifle came from Tula Arms Plant reserve stock and entered the market before undergoing civilian weapon standardization procedures, thus retaining its military weapon characteristics.

<color=#4fc3f7>Single-shot damage: Creature 150 / Block 100</color>
axmc.name: Accuracy International AXMC .338 LM Bolt-Action Sniper Rifle [AXMC]
axmc.desc:
The AXMC is a bolt-action sniper rifle built by British company Accuracy International, incorporating extensive design experience from previous generations of equipment and refined through combat use. Chambered in .338 Lapua Magnum, it can be quickly converted to fire .300 Winchester Magnum or .308 Winchester ammunition by replacing the barrel, bolt assembly, and magazine well mechanism.

<color=#ffcc00>[Special Effect] This sniper rifle is equipped with a scope. When held in the main hand, it increases view range.</color>
<color=#4fc3f7>Single-shot damage: Creature 310 / Block 299</color>
dvl10.name: DVL-10 7.62x51 Bolt-Action Sniper Rifle [DVL-10]
dvl10.desc:
The DVL-10 is a rifle that combines lightness, compactness, and sound suppression. It uses military subsonic ammunition with excellent accuracy and range to meet the needs of special operations and combat missions. Equipped with a standard Lobaev folding stock and Lobaev Hummer Barrels stainless steel competition-grade barrel.

<color=#4fc3f7>Single-shot damage: Creature 205 / Block 180</color>
akm.name: AKM 7.62x39 Assault Rifle [AKM]
akm.desc:
The AKM 7.62x39mm assault rifle was adopted by the Soviet Army in 1959, replacing the early AK rifles used by ground forces. The main differences from the early AK include improved accuracy, reduced overall weight, new stock, trigger and sear assembly, and a new muzzle brake. These upgrades effectively improved the combat effectiveness of the AKM.

<color=#4fc3f7>Single-shot damage: Creature 120 / Block 90</color>
akm_mag.name: AKM 30-Round Magazine
akm_mag.desc: Dedicated 30-round 7.62x39 magazine for the AKM, compatible with 7.62x39 SP ammunition.
axmc_mag.name: AXMC .338 LM Magazine [10-Round]
axmc_mag.desc: AXMC sniper rifle .338 Lapua Magnum 10-round capacity magazine.
dvl10_mag.name: DVL-10 Magazine [10-Round]
dvl10_mag.desc: Standard DVL-10 sniper rifle magazine, suitable for .308 caliber ammunition.
76251bpz.name: 7.62x51mm BPZ FMJ Rifle Round
76251bpz.desc: This ammunition was primarily used for hunting, self-defense, and target shooting at the time. Despite being a civilian cartridge, the BPZ FMJ has remarkable stopping power and penetration capability, capable of easily penetrating low-to-medium tier armor.
76239sp.name: 7.62x39mm SP Rifle Round
76239sp.desc: A 7.62x39 cartridge suitable for shooting training and recreation. This caliber remains popular today.
12g85.name: 12/70 Magnum 8.5mm Buckshot
12g85.desc: 12/70 buckshot for 12-gauge shotguns, loaded with 8 steel pellets of 8.5mm diameter.
338ucw.name: .338 Lapua Magnum UCW Rifle Round
338ucw.desc: .338 Lapua Magnum (8.6x70mm) UCW ammunition, total bullet weight 16.2g, lead core with brass jacket construction. .338 caliber ammunition delivers highly concentrated shot placement at long distances, with outstanding stopping power and lethal effectiveness, making it particularly suitable for hunting large animals. The UCW's streamlined bullet construction maintains good velocity retention and energy, effectively threatening low-to-medium tier armor, but also has a higher probability of ricochet upon impact.
50copper.name: .50 AE Solid Copper
50copper.desc: .50 AE solid copper ammunition. Good thing this cave has copper ore.
45fmj.name: .45 ACP FMJ
45fmj.desc: Military .45 ACP full metal jacket ammunition.
deagle.name: Magnum Research "Desert Eagle" L6 .50 AE Pistol
deagle.desc:
The Desert Eagle L6 is an improved version of the .50 action hunting pistol. This pistol is massive in size and not the best choice for combat, but it is definitely a unique short-barrel weapon. It has become a regular in video games due to its aggressive appearance and huge size. To this day, it remains the most famous pistol in the world. Manufactured by Magnum Research.

<color=#4fc3f7>Single-shot damage: Creature 110 / Block 60</color>
deagle_mag.name: Desert Eagle Magazine [7-Round]
deagle_mag.desc: Desert Eagle .50 AE pistol magazine, 7-round capacity.
glock17.name: GLOCK 17 9x19 Pistol
glock17.desc:
The Glock 17 is a pistol designed by the Austrian company Glock in the 21st century for the Austrian military. It is currently widely used in law enforcement, shooting sports, and civilian self-defense. Its impressive combat characteristics and reliability earned it widespread recognition at the time.

<color=#4fc3f7>Single-shot damage: Creature 50 / Block 20</color>
glock17_mag.name: GLOCK 17 Magazine [17-Round]
919pso.name: 9x19mm PSO gzh
919pso.desc: 9x19mm Parabellum PSO pistol cartridge, bullet weight 7.5g, bimetal jacket, primarily designed for sport shooting and hunting. Despite the relatively low muzzle velocity, the bullet produces significant expansion upon impact, delivering excellent stopping power and lethality.
m4a1.name: Colt M4A1 5.56x45 Carbine
m4a1.desc:
The Colt M4A1 carbine is an improved version of the previous generation M4 carbine. The receiver top features a Picatinny rail, replacing the integrated carry handle with a detachable one. To remove the burst-only limitation of the original M4, the M4A1 uses the M16A1 lower receiver, enabling full-auto fire. Designed primarily for special forces requirements.

<color=#4fc3f7>Single-shot damage: Creature 90 / Block 70</color>
m4a1_mag.name: M4A1 Magazine [30-Round]
55645fmj.name: 5.56x45mm FMJ
55645fmj.desc: .223 Remington (5.56x45mm) Full Metal Jacket (FMJ) ammunition, with a 3.6g (55 grain) lead core bullet, bimetal jacket, and steel case. Designed for hunting, home defense, and sport shooting. Despite its simple construction and modest penetration, FMJ ammunition can still penetrate low-to-medium tier armor.
p90.name: FN P90 5.7x28 SMG
p90.desc:
The FN P90 is a compact personal defense weapon (PDW) designed and manufactured by Belgian company FN Herstal. In the late 20th century, NATO AC225 document publicly required the development of a new generation of personal defense weapons. The P90 was born in response, becoming the world's first PDW. Compact, powerful, and with manageable recoil, it became the preferred self-defense weapon for armored vehicle crews, crew-served weapon operators, and logistics personnel. Special forces and counter-terrorism units worldwide have also procured this SMG.

<color=#4fc3f7>Single-shot damage: Creature 45 / Block 35</color>
p90_mag.name: P90 Magazine [50-Round]
5728sb193.name: 5.7x28mm SB193
5728sb193.desc: 5.7x28mm FN SB193 subsonic cartridge, with a 4g lead core brass-jacketed bullet, brass case. Designed for use with FN57 and P90 suppressors to minimize sound signature, with reduced propellant charge to ensure reliable cycling. Despite low muzzle velocity, it can still effectively threaten low-to-medium tier armor, though its construction results in a higher probability of ricochet.
mp153.name: MP-153 12-Gauge Semi-Auto Shotgun [MP 153]
mp153.desc:
The MP-153 is a semi-automatic smoothbore shotgun designed and manufactured by IzhMekh (Izhevsk Mechanical Plant). A reliable and practical weapon for hunting and self-defense. It appears to have an extended magazine tube.

<color=#4fc3f7>Pellet damage (x8): Creature 41 / Block 30</color>
ump45.name: HK UMP 45 SMG [UMP 45]
ump45.desc:
The HK UMP submachine gun was developed by Heckler & Koch in the 20th century, designed to be a lighter and cheaper alternative to replace the MP5. This version of the UMP fires .45 ACP ammunition with a lower rate of fire. This weapon is equipped with a suppressor, making it more friendly to your ears.

<color=#ffcc00>[Special Effect] This weapon is equipped with a suppressor, significantly reducing firing noise.</color>
<color=#4fc3f7>Single-shot damage: Creature 44 / Block 27</color>
ump45_mag.name: UMP 45 Magazine [25-Round]
ump45_mag.desc: HK UMP 45 SMG magazine, 25-round capacity, compatible with .45 ACP ammunition.
rpd.name: RPD 7.62x39 LMG [RPD]
rpd.desc:
A Degtyaryov light machine gun chambered in 7.62x39mm ammunition. This weapon was primarily issued to the Soviet Army from the late 1940s to the early 1960s, serving as supporting firepower for infantry squads and platoon-level units. The RPD's design was remarkably refined for its time, with a compact structure, excellent reliability, and impeccable firepower output as a machine gun. Manufactured by the V.A. Degtyaryov Plant.

<color=#4fc3f7>Single-shot damage: Creature 87 / Block 67</color>
rpd_mag.name: RPD 100-Round Belt Drum
rpd_mag.desc: The standard 100-round belt drum magazine for the RPD light machine gun, jokingly referred to by some firearm collectors as a 'log'. Manufactured by the V.A. Degtyaryov Plant.
redrebel.name: Red Rebel Ice Axe [Red Rebel]
redrebel.desc:
A perfectly balanced ice axe with a tip made of high-hardness metal. Centuries ago, it was the most desired equipment for all mountaineers.

<color=#ffcc00>[Special Effect] When held in the main hand, the ice axe grants climbing ability.</color>
<color=#4fc3f7>Single attack: Creature 37 / Block 35</color>
m2sword.name: Miller Bros. Blades M-2 Tactical Sword [M-2]
m2sword.desc:
The “M-2” tactical short sword crafted by Miller Bros Blades.

<color=#4fc3f7>Single attack: Creature 87 / Block 31</color>
usp.name: HK USP .45 ACP Pistol [USP]
usp.desc:
The HK USP (Universelle Selbstladepistole) earned widespread acclaim in the international market for its outstanding accuracy and reliability. The USP employs an improved Browning-style action with a patented recoil reduction system that reduces wear on firearm components while also mitigating felt recoil for the shooter. This .45 ACP variant was designed and manufactured by Heckler & Koch.

<color=#4fc3f7>Single-shot damage: Creature 40 / Block 42</color>
usp_mag.name: USP .45 ACP Magazine [12-Round]
mbss.name: Eagle Allied Industries MBSS Plate Carrier (Coyote Brown) [MBSS]
mbss.desc: This body armor is part of the Maritime Ballistic Survival System (MBSS). Since it lacks a quick-release system and cannot be rapidly detached after water immersion, it features a built-in buoyancy layer to provide flotation in emergencies. To you, this equipment is not outdated.
tv115.name: Wartech TV-115 Plate Carrier (Olive Drab) [TV-115]
tv115.desc: The TV-115 combat armor system equipped with Class 3 HDPE ballistic plates, offering limited protection to the thorax and back only. Manufactured by WARTECH.
tv110.name: Wartech TV-110 Plate Carrier (Taupe) [TV-110]
tv110.desc: The LBS TV-110 plate carrier comes with a full set of pouch systems. Manufactured by WARTECH.
sppcv2.name: Stich Profi V2 Plate Carrier (Black) [SP PC V2]
sppcv2.desc: An improved lightweight plate carrier. Manufactured by Stich Profi.
mk4a.name: CQC Osprey MK4A Plate Carrier (Assault, Multicam) [MK4A Assault]
mk4a.desc: The Osprey plate carrier was favored by the British military and special forces centuries ago. The Assault variant features numerous pockets for extra ammunition and grenades.
sieger.name: First Spear Siege-R Optimized M.A.S.S. Plate Carrier (Black Legion) [Siege-R]
sieger.desc: A First Spear Siege-R Optimized plate carrier equipped with the Modular Additional Armor System (M.A.S.S.) shoulder suspension. Provides reliable all-around protection while leaving ample room for movement and weapon handling. Black edition. This armor has a pretty cool morale patch on the chest, but it's heavy...
6b516.name: 6B5-16 Zh-86 Uley Armored Rig (Khaki) [6B5-16]
6b516.desc: The 6B5 "Beehive" armored rig was officially adopted by the Soviet Armed Forces in 1986. The 6B5-16 variant features titanium ballistic plates, providing Class 3 protection against shell fragments and small arms fire, and also includes several magazine pouches and utility compartments. This antique looks like it belongs in a museum.
ttsk.name: Tasmanian Tiger SK Plate Carrier (Black Multicam) [TT SK]
ttsk.desc: The TT SK plate carrier is made of lightweight, durable laminated TPU Cordura nylon with a fabric density of 700 denier. This carrier features two plate pockets, adjustable shoulder straps, and a waist belt. Includes pockets that can hold four magazines.
avste.name: Crye Precision AVS Plate Carrier (Tagilla Edition) [AVS TE]
avste.desc: A plate carrier belonging to someone named Tagilla, already battered and worn. Modified from a standard AVS modular carrier system manufactured by Crye Precision, with only 3 magazine pouches remaining on the front. Uncomfortable to wear. There's also a middle finger drawn on the back as a prank.
lv119.name: Spiritus Systems LV-119 Plate Carrier (Black Legion V1) [LV-119]
lv119.desc: A highly customizable modular plate carrier that maximizes wearer comfort in combat, designed and manufactured by Spiritus Systems. Wolf grey version. The convenient layout allows the user to easily carry spare ammunition and other essential equipment without restricting freedom of movement.
6b45.name: 6B45 Armored Rig (Medical) [6B45]
6b45.desc: A 6B45 armored vest equipped with a full set of accessories, combining the functions of body armor and a tactical rig. This configuration is compact and practical, capable of carrying essential field medical supplies and communication equipment.
idea.name: IDEA DIY Chest Rig [IDEA]
idea.desc: Looks like a chest rig made from a shopping bag from some mall. Can't say this thing has any broad military or tactical application, but it's right up a homeless person's alley.
bankrobber.name: Spiritus Systems Bank Robber Chest Rig (Alpine Multicam) [Bank Robber]
bankrobber.desc: A super compact and lightweight tactical chest rig, guaranteeing both mobility and wearing comfort. Manufactured by Spiritus Systems, Alpine Multicam version. Those who want to do live-action role-playing in winter are in luck.
type56.name: Type 56 Chest Rig [TYPE 56]
type56.desc: The Type 56 chest rig is regarded as the ancestor of modern tactical chest rig systems. Designed in the 1950s for the Chinese People's Liberation Army, it was widely used throughout the 20th century. In the 1980s, this chest rig made its way to the Afghan battlefield, where it gained recognition from the Soviet military. Whether the Soviet Belt-A chest rig was based on it remains a mystery.
wtchestrig.name: WARTECH TV-109 + TV-106 Chest Rig (A-TACS Olive Drab) [WT chest rig]
wtchestrig.desc: The WARTECH composite chest rig system consists of the TV-106 field webbing belt and the TV-109 heavy suspension system. The gear shoulder straps are padded with foam to reinforce the overall structure, and feature MOLLE system straps for additional functionality. When combined, the TV-106 and TV-109 form a fully functional tactical chest rig system.
lbcr.name: LBT-1961A Load-Bearing Chest Rig (MAS Grey) [LBCR]
lbcr.desc: A tactical load-bearing system designed to carry magazines, grenades and special equipment, used in conjunction with body armor.
commando.name: Blackhawk! Commando Chest Rig (Desert Tan) [Commando]
commando.desc: A magazine rig designed for comfortable and convenient quick access to a large number of magazines.
umka.name: Umka M33-SET1 Hunter Vest [Umka]
umka.desc: Umka M33-SET1 vest, designed centuries ago for hunters, travelers, combatants and security personnel.
blackrock.name: BlackRock Chest Rig [BlackRock]
blackrock.desc: A handcrafted tactical chest rig tailored for urban combat, designed to be worn over armor. Sturdy and practical, featuring both MOLLE and ALICE attachment systems.
paca.name: PACA Soft Armor Vest [PACA]
paca.desc: Lightweight yet reliable and durable? body armor, covering only the vital areas of the torso.
mfun.name: MF-UNTAR Bulletproof Vest [MF-UN]
mfun.desc: A Class III bulletproof vest equipped by the United Nations for UNTAR peacekeeping soldiers during an operation in Tarkov long ago. Heaven knows how it ended up here.
drd.name: DRD Body Armor [DRD]
drd.desc: A lightweight yet durable and reliable body armor. A special edition from the one and only Dr. Disrespect. If you could bring it back to Earth, it would definitely fetch a good price!
thor.name: NFM THOR Concealable Enhanced Body Armor [THOR CRV]
thor.desc: The THOR concealable enhanced body armor can be worn openly or concealed under clothing without ballistic plates, providing all-round protection against high-speed fragments and pistol ammunition. With hard armor plates installed, the armor's protection level can be further enhanced to protect vital organs from rifle threats. Its soft ballistic inner lining layout is ergonomic, the back panel position is well-designed, and the integrated lumbar support belt system ensures stability at the body's center of gravity while maintaining tactical mobility. Manufactured by NFM Group.
trooper.name: HighCom Trooper TFO Body Armor (Multicam) [Trooper]
trooper.desc: A body armor produced by Highcom, favored by 21st century mercenaries known as "USEC". Multicam version.
6b13.name: 6B13 Assault Armor (Jungle Camo) [6B13]
6b13.desc: The standard body armor previously issued to Russian ground forces, airborne troops, naval infantry and other combat units. This armor model is primarily designed to protect vital organs from bullets, shrapnel, mines, grenades and even cold weapons; even if the armor is hit in combat, the severity of blunt force trauma to the wearer is significantly reduced. Jungle camo version.
hpc.name: Hexatac HPC Plate Carrier (Black Multicam) [HPC]
hpc.desc: A plate carrier produced by Hexatac, with its structure simplified to the maximum extent while maintaining full functionality. Black Multicam version.
gzhel_k.name: BNTI Gzhel-K Body Armor [GZHEL-K]
gzhel_k.desc: The Gzhel assault body armor was primarily designed to meet the operational needs of internal affairs assault units and other law enforcement agencies at the time.
redut_t5.name: FORT Redut-T5 Body Armor (Smoke Camo) [Redut-T5]
redut_t5.desc: The FORT Redut T5 is an enhanced version of the Redut series of body armor, developed incorporating years of Russian Federation counter-terrorism experience. Smoke camo version.
slick.name: LBT 6094A Slick Plate Carrier (Coyote Tan) [Slick]
slick.desc: A minimalist ballistic plate carrier designed by LBT, with its structure simplified to the maximum extent. Coyote tan version.
hgrid.name: 5.11 Hexgrid Plate Carrier [HGrid]
hgrid.desc: The Hexgrid plate carrier features an ergonomic smooth surface design that enhances wearing comfort during movement, and can be paired with tactical chest rig equipment. While offering high protection with extreme lightweight, its durability is very low! Designed and manufactured by 5.11 Tactical.
6b43.name: 6B43 Zabralo-Sh Body Armor (Digital Jungle Camo) [6B43]
6b43.desc: The 6B43 Zabralo-Sh body armor is designed to withstand various small arms bullets including armor-piercing (BP) and anti-personnel (PP) ammunition, grenade and mine fragments, and even melee weapons, while also reducing the lethal effects of bullets that penetrate the armor in combat. “I am unstoppable!”
cheapplate.name: Standard Ballistic Plate
cheapplate.desc: A standard ballistic plate that can be used to repair body armor.
advancedplate.name: Advanced Ballistic Plate
advancedplate.desc: An advanced composite ballistic plate offering superior protection, used to repair high-grade body armor.
ryst.name: Rys-T Ballistic Helmet (Black) [Rys-T]
ryst.desc: The Rys-T (Lynx-T) ballistic helmet is a lightweight upgraded version of the famous Altyn helmet. It was issued to special assault units of the Russian Ministry of Internal Affairs. Equipped with a dedicated reinforced protective visor.
exfil.name: Team Wendy EXFIL Ballistic Helmet (Coyote Brown) [EXFIL]
exfil.desc: A ballistic helmet with excellent expansion performance. The EXFIL LTP (Light, Tactical, Polymer) bump helmet provides impact protection for personnel operating in maritime environments, offering comfort while serving as a stable platform for mounting night vision devices and other accessories. EXFIL integrates an aluminum Wilcox NVG shroud. Coyote brown version. There's a ballistic visor on the helmet, but it's full of bullet holes and no longer usable.
ulach.name: Highcom Striker ULACH IIIA Helmet (Black) [ULACH]
ulach.desc: A tactical helmet produced by Highcom, with protection covering the ears and back of the head. Not equipped with any mounting interface. Black.
6b47.name: 6B47 Ratnik-BSh Helmet (Digital Camo Cover) [6B47]
6b47.desc: The 6B47 is an aramid ballistic helmet produced in Russia. As a core component of the Ratnik individual combat system, the 6B47 served as the primary standard-issue helmet for the Russian Federation Armed Forces. Its protection level is on par with previous generations such as the 6B7-1M and 6B27, but with significantly reduced weight, even providing some buoyancy in water. The helmet integrates lighting equipment and night vision mounts, offering outstanding tactical expansion capabilities. Various camouflage covers can be fitted for different environments. This version features a digital jungle camouflage cover.
ssh68.name: SSh-68 Steel Helmet (1968) [SSh-68]
ssh68.desc: The SSh-68 is the last steel helmet officially adopted by the Soviet Army during the Cold War in the 20th century, replacing the previous generation SSh-60 steel helmet. Compared to its predecessor, the SSh-68 uses newly developed high-hardness No. 15 steel, making it more robust and durable. The front of the shell has a steeper angle, causing enemy bullets to more easily deflect and ricochet; the side ear protection is shortened to avoid snagging on environmental objects.
calman.name: Galvion Caiman Composite Ballistic Helmet (Alpine Multicam) [Calman]
calman.desc: The Caiman composite ballistic helmet is a new generation lightweight special forces helmet. It comes with a range of modular accessories for enhancing helmet functionality, providing the wearer with a lightweight and comfortable wearing experience while maximizing protection. Designed and manufactured by Galvion, Alpine Multicam version.
lk3f.name: LolKek 3F Transfer Travel Backpack [LK 3F]
lk3f.desc: A simple and cheap backpack produced by LolKek. Not particularly comfortable or durable, but it's no problem for carrying loot.
readypack.name: Vertx Ready Pack Backpack (Red) [ReadyPack]
readypack.desc: A tactical (but not really tactical) everyday carry backpack, 20 liters. Manufactured by Vertx, red version.
partizan.name: Partizan's Pack [Partizan]
partizan.desc: A weathered Gorka pack. It belonged to the Partisan during the Tarkov conflict centuries ago, adorned with the patches of many PMC "trophies" — both USEC and BEAR feared him deeply at the time. Anger this master of guerrilla warfare, and you would meet the same fate.
daypack.name: LBT-8005A Day Pack Backpack (Black Multicam) [Day Pack]
daypack.desc: A simple and reliable black multicam backpack, 14 liters. Manufactured by London Bridge Trading.
berkut.name: WARTECH Berkut BB-102 Backpack (A-TACS FG) [Berkut]
berkut.desc: A tactical backpack with a fully openable front. Suitable for military or security personnel, and great for WarGame too. Designed and manufactured by WARTECH.
scavpack.name: Scav Backpack [Scavpack]
scavpack.desc: A cheap knockoff of a certain 3-day assault pack. Its previous owner did their best to improve the MOLLE attachment system. While not very comfortable and with far less capacity than the genuine assault pack, it's still a pack that can hold stuff. As for why it's called that name, you have no idea either.
mysteryranch2day.name: Mystery Ranch 2 Day Assault Pack (Black) [2 Day Assault]
mysteryranch2day.desc: This Mystery Ranch backpack is built for short-term missions, capable of holding up to 2 days' worth of gear and supplies. Excellent ergonomics partially offset the pack's limited capacity, and the additional strap system provides extra attachment points for conveniently securing tools and equipment needed during the mission.
pilgrim.name: Pilgrim Travel Backpack [Pilgrim]
pilgrim.desc: A large-capacity travel backpack in bright colors, the perfect choice for travelers embarking on a journey.
ssoattack2.name: SSO Attack 2 Assault Backpack (Khaki) [Attack 2]
ssoattack2.desc: The Ataka 2 (Attack 2) assault backpack has a capacity of 60 liters, capable of carrying personal items and various individual equipment in harsh battlefield environments.
6sh118.name: 6SH118 Assault Backpack [6SH118]
6sh118.desc: The 6Sh118 assault backpack is one of the components of the Russian Army's second-generation Ratnik (Warrior) individual combat system. This tactical military backpack is a modernized improved version of the 6B38 Permyachka assault backpack, designed to carry firepower support equipment, weapons and ammunition, climbing gear, and soldier personal items, suitable for combat operations, long marches, and assault missions.
6lbt2670.name: 6LBT-2670 Small Field Medical Pack [SFMP]
6lbt2670.desc: A low-profile medical backpack specifically designed to hold a large amount of specialized medical equipment and pharmaceuticals. Manufactured by London Bridge Trading.
